author: y4rr
content: Audit complete. The trait defaults in gpu_dispatch.rs are misleading — CudaBackendImpl in backend_impl.rs overrides almost all of them. Truly unimplemented stubs (no backend_impl override): svd_f32, cholesky_f32, solve_f32, qr_f32 (cuSOLVER linalg), all f64 ops (add/sub/mul/neg/relu/matmul/sum), save_rng_state/restore_rng_state. All backward activation kernels (sigmoid, tanh, softmax, layernorm, sum_axis, relu, gelu) are FULLY IMPLEMENTED with PTX kernels.
